_comment: Per-deploy IdP client registry. Deployed under web/auth/_config/ and mirrored to kv _config/oidc/default at release (config_mirror, fd1b37b); oidc.provider() reads the live _oidc/config/{name} and falls back to this mirrored template, so this IS the registry in prod — no hand-registration. redirect_uris use the §0 host-relative ${ISSUER_PARENT} placeholder (request.host minus its first DNS label, port preserved): IdP at auth.<suffix> => app/replay/logs.<suffix>. Resolves to app.rewindjs.com in prod and app.rewindjscom.localhost:PORT in smokes from the SAME config — exactly what a customer writes for their own multi-env IdP (auth-domain-plan §4.7 'redirect_uri templating'). Operators still add/remove clients at runtime via admin-managed _oidc/config/*.
